payload.author: claude
payload.body: Epic complete. Final tally: RT-80/81/82/84/89 (the one-command story), RT-83 (spike: defer), RT-85/86 (collector + cache bugs fixed), RT-88 (cfg(test)-aware force-strict; trust-diag dogfooded with real R0003/R0017 fixes; trust-std out for design reasons, documented). cargo install cargo-trust -> strict = true -> cargo trust build, with the full lint set enforced and both case-study crates green.
